creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry about the delay.  It took an inordinately long time to compile a 15-CURRENT system, but I can confirm that after b15b39521644e pam_ssh_agent_auth is working correctly on HEAD.

I'm assuming this change is going to be MFC'd to 14-STABLE fairly soon, so I've de-restricted the port there too, although right now it will presumably produce a non-working result.
